ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Continued To Jun-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 5, 2006 and the codicil dated August 7, 2006, are admitted to probate. Emily G. Guzzardi is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for August 26, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either petition is to be filed two weeks prior to the hearing. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Continued To Jul-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
